## Sample context

> — The twilight reflection of Toril; home of the                                      , drawn near to the Material Plane since the Spellplague.
> A parallel plane — the *twilight reflection* of Toril, alike in geography but lit differently, scaled differently, ruled by entirely different powers. Time runs at its own pace; a night spent at a fey ball can be a year…
> The **Spellplague** a century past pulled the Feywild close to Toril, and crossings between worlds quietly multiplied. With the **Weave healed** and Mystra's return, those crossings have *stabilized rather than closed*…
